title: Kong rate limiting returns 429 after threshold exceeded
description: Send requests above the rate limit threshold to Kong auth route. Must return 429 Too Many Requests. Requires multiple sequential HTTP calls — cannot be verified by a single request.
preconditions: Rate limiting plugin configured on auth route
author: vjan-nie
notes: Requires runner support for repeated requests (sequence executor). Until then, verify manually or convert to bash test with a curl loop.
